_ImportMode_help: Optional. 'scan' (default) sends a DownloadedEpisodesScan command to Sonarr -- proven path, fires SignalR notifications, UI updates without refresh. 'manualimport' POSTs to /api/v3/manualimport with explicit episode IDs -- faster (no folder scan), more precise, but the UI-update behaviour around it is still being validated (see fix22). Smart queue cleanup runs in both modes.
